creator: ports@grosbein.net
text:
On Sun, Nov 18, 2007 at 03:45:57PM +0900, Thomas E. Zander wrote:

> This is different now. The rc2 version expects to find external libs
> and links to it. The mplayer developers expect us to follow this link,
> http://www.penguin.cz/~utx/amr
> and use these tarballs to get amr running. It seems we need to create a
> new port that manages the amr libs. Could you have a look at this
> please?

Well, then things are even much simplier. As I've already noted,
there are ports audio/libamrnb and audio/libamrwb. And tests show
they are pretty useful for rc2.

> As a reference, this is my current port update to the rc2 port:
> http://www.rrr.de/~riggs/mplayer/m20071118.tar.bz2
> 
> It would be great if amr fixes/patches worked with the ports in this
> tarball as rc2 will probably be committed to the ports tree soonish.

Here is a patch for rc2:

diff -urN mplayer.orig/Makefile mplayer/Makefile
--- mplayer.orig/Makefile	2007-11-18 13:30:38.000000000 +0700
+++ mplayer/Makefile	2007-11-18 23:14:04.000000000 +0700
@@ -58,6 +58,7 @@
 OPTIONS+=	LIBCDIO "Enable libcdio support" off
 OPTIONS+=	CDPARANOIA "Enable cdparanoia support" off
 OPTIONS+=	LIBLZO "Enable external liblzo library" off
+OPTIONS+=	AMR "Enable AMR audio codecs support" off
 OPTIONS+=	JOYSTICK "Enable joystick support" off
 
 MAN1=		mplayer.1
diff -urN mplayer.orig/Makefile.options mplayer/Makefile.options
--- mplayer.orig/Makefile.options	2007-11-18 13:30:01.000000000 +0700
+++ mplayer/Makefile.options	2007-11-18 23:41:50.000000000 +0700
@@ -283,3 +283,8 @@
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--disable-real
 .endif
 .endif
+
+.if defined(WITH_AMR)
+LIB_DEPENDS+=		amrnb:${PORTSDIR}/audio/libamrnb \
+			amrwb:${PORTSDIR}/audio/libamrwb
+.endif


Eugene Grosbein
